name: Archibald Wavell
longDesc: Archibald Wavell commande le Middle East Command lors de la campagne d'Éthiopie et du succès Compass contre les Italiens en 1940. En WC4, carte infanterie tier-S or à bonus désert : pick naturel pour l'Afrique du Nord côté allié.

skills.name: Infantry Training Master
skills.desc: Reduce the damage taken by 4% per level based on the level of the elite force infantry under command. Elite Force Infantry does not lose attack power when their HP is reduced.

skills.name: Prudence
skills.desc: Self-morale will not be disrupted. Self and 1 square of friendly troops around it will have their counterattack damage increased by 15%.

skills.name: Infantry Leader
skills.desc: 24% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding infantry units

skills.name: Raider
skills.desc: Deal +24% damage to the enemy when commanding infantry units

skills.name: Explosives
skills.desc: Damage +24% when attacking the stronghold units

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Archibald Wavell ran Middle East Command during the Ethiopian campaign and the Operation Compass success against the Italians in 1940. In WC4 a tier-S gold infantry card with desert bonuses — the natural Allied pick for North Africa.
longDescDe: Archibald Wavell führte während des Äthiopienfeldzugs und bei Operation Compass 1940 gegen die Italiener das Middle East Command. Im WC4 eine S-Klasse-Gold-Infanteriekarte mit Wüstenboni — die natürliche alliierte Wahl für Nordafrika.
